# Sol Mate — Full Machine-Readable Manifest
# https://sol-mate-landing-production.up.railway.app
# Updated: 2026-05-06

## IDENTITY
Name: Sol Mate
Tagline: Stake USDC to DM, match, and meet. No-shows get slashed on Solana.
Type: Social dApp — Web3 / Solana
Hackathon: EasyA × Consensus Miami 2026
Built by: AINative Studio (https://ainative.studio)
Network: Solana (devnet), Base (Coinbase x402)
API: https://sol-mate-trust-api-production.up.railway.app
Docs: https://sol-mate-trust-api-production.up.railway.app/docs

## HOW IT WORKS
1. Connect Phantom or Solflare wallet
2. Stake USDC to send a DM, enter a room, or propose a meetup
3. Both parties must confirm (GPS attestation) for meetup to count
4. No-show → stake slashed. Show up → stake returned + reputation boost
5. After a confirmed meetup, mint a Moment NFT as proof of connection

## STAKE TYPES
| Type | Minimum stake | Slashing trigger |
|------|--------------|-----------------|
| DM   | 0.01 USDC    | Sender no-show or harassment |
| Room entry | 0.10 USDC | No-show at event |
| Meetup | 1.00 USDC | No-show (GPS unconfirmed) |

## SLASHING POLICY
| Reason | Slash % | Notes |
|--------|---------|-------|
| NO_SHOW | 50% base, escalating | 0.5× per offense, 3× maximum multiplier |
| HARASSMENT | 100% | Always slashed, no appeal |
| FAKE_PROFILE | 100% | Always slashed |
| CONSENT_VIOLATION | 100% | Always slashed |
| SPAM | 30% | First offense warning |
| PAYMENT_FRAUD | 100% | Always slashed |

## REPUTATION DIMENSIONS
1. Reliability — shows up when committed
2. Safety — no harassment or consent violations reported
3. Communication — responds within reasonable time
4. Punctuality — arrives on time for meetups
5. Authenticity — profile matches real identity (verified via attestation)

Score range: 0.0–1.0 per dimension. Decays over time without activity. Anchored to Hedera HCS for tamper-proof history.

## AI MATCHMAKING PIPELINE
1. User preference embedding: POST /zerodb/embed (BAAI/bge-base-en-v1.5, 768 dims) via AINative API
2. Preference stored in ZeroDB vector store
3. Match request triggers cosine similarity search across compatible users
4. Intro message generated by claude-sonnet-4-5 via AINative LLM gateway
5. Moderation: llama-3.3-8b-instruct filters harmful content before delivery

## API REFERENCE

### Authentication
POST /api/v1/auth/wallet/connect
Step 1 — Get challenge:
  Body: { "wallet_address": "string" }
  Response: { "challenge": "string", "expires_at": "iso8601" }
Step 2 — Verify signature:
  Body: { "wallet_address": "string", "signature": "string", "challenge": "string" }
  Response: { "access_token": "string", "token_type": "bearer" }

### Rooms
GET /api/v1/rooms
  Query: limit (default 20), offset (default 0), category (optional)
  Response: { "items": [...], "total": int }

### Stakes
POST /api/v1/stakes
  Body: { "stake_type": "dm|room|meetup", "target_id": "uuid", "amount_usdc": float }
  Response: { "id": "uuid", "tx_signature": "string", "status": "pending|confirmed" }

### Matches
POST /api/v1/matches
  Body: { "target_user_id": "uuid" }
  Response: { "id": "uuid", "status": "pending|matched|rejected", "intro_message": "string" }

### Messages
POST /api/v1/messages
  Body: { "match_id": "uuid", "content": "string" }
  Response: { "id": "uuid", "created_at": "iso8601" }

### Attestations
POST /api/v1/attestations
  Body: { "meetup_id": "uuid", "gps_lat": float, "gps_lng": float, "confirmed": bool }
  Response: { "id": "uuid", "status": "pending|approved|rejected" }

### Transfers
POST /api/v1/transfers
  Body: { "recipient_wallet": "string", "amount_sol": float, "message": "string (optional)" }
  Response: { "id": "uuid", "status": "pending", "tx_signature": null }

### Moment NFTs
POST /api/v1/nfts/mint-moment
  Body: { "attestation_id": "uuid", "name": "string", "description": "string (optional)" }
  Response: { "id": "uuid", "status": "pending", "mint_address": null }
GET /api/v1/nfts/moments
  Query: limit (default 20, max 100), offset (default 0)
  Response: { "items": [...], "total": int }

## OPEN SOURCE PACKAGES

### solmate-stake-sdk (Python)
pip install solmate-stake-sdk
- StakeGate: enforce stake requirements on any action
- StakeRecord: track stake history and outcomes
- SlashingPolicy: configurable slash percentages, escalating no-show multiplier
- SlashReason enum: NO_SHOW, HARASSMENT, FAKE_PROFILE, CONSENT_VIOLATION, SPAM, PAYMENT_FRAUD

### solmate-reputation (Python)
pip install solmate-reputation
- ReputationEngine: 5-dimension score calculation with decay
- Hedera HCS anchoring for tamper-proof reputation history
- Decay: scores decay toward 0.5 without activity

### solmate-x402 (Python)
pip install solmate-x402
- FastAPI middleware for Coinbase x402 HTTP-native USDC payments on Base
- Drop-in decorator: @require_payment(amount=0.01, currency="USDC")

## WALLET SUPPORT
- Phantom (https://phantom.app)
- Solflare (https://solflare.com)
- Mobile Wallet Adapter (iOS + Android)

## COINBASE x402
- Network: Base mainnet
- Currency: USDC
- Feature flag: NEXT_PUBLIC_X402_ENABLED
- Flow: HTTP 402 response → wallet signs payment → retry with payment header

## SECURITY
Contact: security@ainative.studio
Responsible disclosure: https://ainative.studio/.well-known/security.txt
